programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy

programme.title: Family Guy: The Unkindest Cut

programme.title: Movie: Dark Angel
programme.desc: Picking up at the end of 'Heaven,' Heaven finds a new life in Boston. Based on the novel by V.C. Andrews, Dark Angel.

programme.title: Movie: Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: After being happily married, Heaven is ready to settle back into her hometown. Based on the novel by V.C. Andrews, Fallen Hearts.

programme.title: Movie: Gates of Paradise
programme.desc: Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family, especially for her half-brother Luke. Annie discovers a hidden cottage in the woods, and the mystery of her past deepens.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Murder in the Family
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo speaks with Paris Lee Bennet to find out why he killed his sister.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Killer Writing
programme.desc: John J. Lennon is a murderer that has built a literary career by writing about the prison system he lives in. Chris Cuomo talks with John J. Lennon about his crime, doing his time, and why he traded his gun for a pen.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Revenge Killing
programme.desc: In 1987, a group of teens, hell-bent on revenge, killed local businessman John Hill who had raped their friend Jennifer. 30 years later, Chris Cuomo speaks to Lisa Harris, the only member of the group who was sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The $6 Million Cut
programme.desc: Parker's record-setting pace rests in the hands of mechanic Shane Smith. Tony taps out the Megacut and pivots to open more ground. Fred calls on Mitch to help fine tune his operation. Dustin's crew returns to the deadly waters of The Chute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Clear Eyes, Full Pans
programme.desc: Rick bets on a new stretch of ground that pays out with a monster nugget. Parker confronts Brennan over a missed opportunity. Tony digs up a relic that could lead him to virgin ground.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Attack or Retreat
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Fred decides to pull the plug, Parker's crew struggles to keep up and Rick prospects some of the best ground he's ever been on.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Endgame
programme.desc: In the final days of the season, Parker's record-breaking season rides on an unproven wash plant. Rick redirects a river to hit big gold. Tony returns to the old timer's honey hole. Fred scrambles for a future.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Welcome Stranger
programme.desc: Parker goes deep into an underground mine, in search of more of the largest nuggets he's ever seen. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim, leading to a rich reward.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Endgame
programme.desc: In the final days of the season, Parker's record-breaking season rides on an unproven wash plant. Rick redirects a river to hit big gold. Tony returns to the old timer's honey hole. Fred scrambles for a future.

programme.desc: Parker goes deep into an underground mine, in search of more of the largest nuggets he's ever seen. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim, leading to a rich reward.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Problem Like Maria
programme.desc: As the super snow-moon storm peaks, the Cornelia Marie's deck becomes a gauntlet for Josh and Casey's greenest greenhorn. Ice fog overtakes the fleet as Monte scrambles to stay afloat, Harley loses an engine and Junior fights a sea-flea infestation.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood is Thicker Than Water

programme.title: Modern Family: Dear Beloved Family
programme.desc: Gloria has to rush Phil to the hospital for an emergency surgery after he experiences some intense stomach pains and rallies the entire family to be by his side.

programme.title: Modern Family: In Your Head
programme.desc: When Luke goes missing after a night out in a sketchy neighbourhood, Manny, Phil and Gloria team up to track him down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Written in the Stars
programme.desc: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset at Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing that doesn't go off as planned.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spanks for the Memories
programme.desc: When Jay overhears Gloria on the phone talking about spanking, he assumes she is frustrated in the bedroom. When he attempts to light the spark again by giving her exactly what she wants, he realizes he might have made a mistake.

programme.title: Modern Family: Wine Weekend
programme.desc: The family goes on a wine tasting trip and stays in Haley's new boss' country house where the only rule is: Don't touch the tiara! Meanwhile, Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house but can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family: Daddy Issues
programme.desc: When Gloria’s ex-boyfriend Jorge stops by for a visit, his striking resemblance to Manny makes Jay question if he might be Manny's real dad; Phil agonizes over getting the perfect anniversary gift for Claire.

programme.title: Modern Family: Royal Visit
programme.desc: Haley's brilliant astrophysicist boyfriend comes to meet the family, setting Claire and Phil off in a competition about which one of them is smarter and making Alex feel self-conscious about her dim but handsome firefighter boyfriend, Bill.

programme.title: Modern Family: CHiPs and Salsa
programme.desc: When Haley hears that her loopy boss is looking for a product with the magical properties of peppers, she tries to gain favour by convincing Gloria to sell her salsa to NERP. Then, Mitchell gets Cam the police ride-along he’s always dreamed of.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother!
programme.desc: When Dede drops in unexpectedly, Mitchell and Cam come to a realization about her effect on their lives; Phil, Luke, Alex and Haley all have different bad news to break to Claire and compete about when to do it.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Escape
programme.desc: Haley meets Arvin's parents but when things don't go as planned, fate leads to an unexpected reunion with all of her ex-boyfriends. Meanwhile, the family seizes on a nursing home visit with Jay's mean sister, Becky, to settle old scores.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clash of Swords
programme.desc: Mitchell sneaks out to 'Hero-Con' with fanboy Phil, dressed as their favourite characters from the show 'Clash of Swords.' It's great until Phil commits the ultimate fan faux pas.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed
programme.desc: Savannah returns home for Jackson's third birthday, she brings her a new puppy. This infuriates Todd. Chase attempts to bond with his dad, purely for his own financial gain.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase
programme.desc: When Chase scores an internship at a local television station, he is forced to deal with some difficult talent, Todd Chrisley. And, looking for a new hobby, Faye and Julie learn Italian.

programme.title: Movie: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island Flavor
programme.desc: Guy's in Hawaii for an authentic taste of Oahu. In Waipahu, a family-run business is serving freshly made favorites right out of mom's cookbook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Places You Sent Me
programme.desc: Viewer recommended spots including In Salt Lake City, a 79-year-old diner serving Mile High biscuits and gravy; in New Orleans, a neighbourhood dive puttin' out roast beef po' boys; in Middletown, Conn., a historic dinner that was rebuilt after a fire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Global Comes Local
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter cook up some Triple-D style takeout with four chefs over video chat. There's authentic Mexican from Phoenix, kolaches from Salt Lake City, Baltimore pit beef and pork belly all the way from Maui.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Beach Sizzle
programme.desc: Guy hits spots in South Beach, Florida like a taqueria and a German restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners You Sent Me To
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads for three great diners that viewers recommended to him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Carnivore Delivery
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are cooking up recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. On this menu, there are monster beef ribs from Las Vegas, a waffle-hamburger mashup from Atlanta and pizza and wings from San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Bit of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy samples international cuisine found across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.desc: Green mesquite smoked classics in Austin; a railroad car turned BBQ shack in California.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Turn Up the Volume
programme.desc: Ina Garten is turning up the volume on flavour, starting with the creamy hummus she pairs with her chunky Israeli vegetable salad.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Spicy
programme.desc: Some like it hot, and some like it spicy, so Ina Garten is making dishes to please both. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry made with a fragrant mix of spices, and her lobster corn fritters are paired with creamy sriracha sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Hug on a Plate
programme.desc: We serve up comforting family favourites like Geoffrey Zakarian's beef stroganoff and Katie Lee's vegetable manicotti. Jeff Mauro puts his spin on a takeout favourite with his General Tso's crispy chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Little Italy Party
programme.desc: With a cuisine that's as varied as its dramatic landscape, the island of Sicily has become very popular for its wide range of interesting foods. Giada De Laurentiis transports her guests to the exotic island with a Sicilian menu.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family-style Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: In Giada's family, Sundays are set aside for family dinners. For a stress-free, traditional family dinner at home, her menu includes casual but hearty dishes like baby back ribs with spicy peach BBQ sauce and spaghetti with zucchini and squash.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Crazy 8's
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and the kids serve up some awesome eats with just 8 ingredients. There's a colorful clementine sprinkle cake, a creamy and crunchy easy chicken tot pie, cheesy stuffed pasta and a shortcut speedy dumpling soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes by Request
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are taking requests for easy, new and creative recipes, starting with easy smothered chicken and grilled red curry lamb chops. There's also a perfect chocolate cake with easy chocolate frosting.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: The Cheap Cuts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends are all about making dishes with the cheap cuts. Aarti Sequeira makes mangalore buns, Michael Voltaggio steams mussels escabeche, Justin Warner cooks tacos con lengua, and Jonathan Waxman beer-braises a lamb shoulder.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 1, Best Of the Best
programme.desc: The five-part tournament kicks off with a stellar group of defending champs, who must first rock a basket that includes pig ears.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 2, Fighting Shape
programme.desc: A lively group of returning winners are revved up for more Chopped Champions drama and excitement, but the first basket features deceptively simple sausage and cabbage.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 3, Chefs In Control
programme.desc: Four returning champs are ready to give it all they've got, and in the appetizer round, they must endure a hard-to-melt candy and a difficult-to-prep veggie. In the entree round, the champs suffer some surprising execution errors.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 4, Kitchen Storm
programme.desc: Geared up for killer cooking and serious drama, a husband and wife are among the returning champs for the fourth round of Chopped Champions. Crab claws and vanilla frosting are two of the surprises in the first basket.

programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Befriending a Beast

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Buyer's Remorse

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flew the Coop

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Sound of Freedom

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: Mountain High Dreams

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Sparkle in the Sunshine State

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Iconic Haunts
programme.desc: We explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites. Gathering a team of ghost hunters, psychic mediums and historians we reveal why these paranormal hotspots deserve their reputation as the most terrifying places in America.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Dark Encounters
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Deadly Destinations
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Hot Spots
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: History of Horror
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Tour of Fright
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: The Old Paulding Jail
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina head to Paulding, Ohio, to explore an infamously haunted jail said to house dozens of spirits, including a young murder victim. The duo has their work cut out for them as they separate rumour from truth during the historic investigation.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: The Shanghai Tunnels
programme.desc: Katrina and Jack gain unprecedented access to the infamous Shanghai Tunnels of Portland, Oregon. They've been called on to determine if two newly restored tunnels are safe for public tours after a recent spike in violent paranormal activity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Au Revoir, Sirocco
programme.desc: A boat catches fire in port stranding Sirocco with nowhere to go. The interior team grows resentful of Sandy's harsh criticisms, while Jack and Aesha contemplate their future off the boat.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Disrespect
programme.desc: After a 35-year-old analyst for the NSA is fatally stabbed, police look at a number of suspects. As detectives close in on the killer, the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Figure in the Garage
programme.desc: He was a single dad, a former firefighter dedicated to helping others. When he was found dead in his garage, police needed help. A neighbor's security camera footage revealed a hooded figure, but who was it? Someone was hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Poison
programme.desc: Larry McNabney had a thriving career and a wife he adored. Then he vanished. It was a mystery as twisted as they come. At its center: three lives tangled together in a love triangle, including one of them who was hiding a secret identity.

programme.title: Exhumed: Mail Order Murder/ Poison in the Plot
programme.desc: An unconventional love story ends in murder when a mail-order bride disappears without a trace. Detectives discover that someone closest to her has a suspicious past, and only an exhumation can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Exhumed: Deadly Generosity/ Bones of Truth
programme.desc: A year after Diana Burrow died of natural causes, a rumor began to spread in the small town of St. Pauls, NC that Diana was murdered. With no evidence obtained from the crime scene, officials have little to investigate unless they exhume her body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Cold Case, Unearthed

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: A husband comes home to find his wife stabbed to death in their home. With little hard evidence to work with, detectives began digging into the couple's complicated past.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: When a woman is killed just four days into her marriage, her husband's ex-girlfriend comes forward to tell about a plot to kill her.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic Relations
programme.desc: Linda Curry had it all: looks, a great job and a brilliant husband. When she got sick, doctors were stumped. Then, she died and police were as puzzled as the doctors, but not her close friends and family. They just needed someone to listen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets of the Snake River
programme.desc: Rachel Anderson was a vivacious single mom whose world revolved around her children. When she failed to show up for work one day, her kids panicked. Might her disappearance have anything to do with those terrifying phone calls she'd been receiving?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Killing in Cottonwood
programme.desc: Karen and Mark Duenas had a special marriage. Teenage sweethearts, the couple managed to keep the romance alive even after raising five boys together. Then a perfectly ordinary night ended in murder, a tragedy that would test the bonds of family.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Love That Kills
programme.desc: A loving, single mother of two is the victim of a bizarre murder, leading detectives to investigate a number of suspects, until a killer with a dark obsession hiding in plain sight is revealed.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Closet Murderer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.desc: When Maggie goes to pre-school, Marge decides to get a job to pass the time and ends up working at an upscale weed dispensary. Then, Homer decides to open his own dispensary that mimics a sketchy drug deal, putting their two businesses at odds.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Warrin' Priests
programme.desc: When Bode, a young charismatic new preacher, comes to town and shakes things up at church, Reverend Lovejoy investigates his mysterious past.

programme.desc: The MythBusters take on five filmic firearm clichés: Will a bent-barreled shot gun fire? Can you fire a gun in space? Will a gun dropped in a deep fryer go off? What weird items will stop a bullet? And does a neon sign really explode when hit by a bullet?

programme.title: MythBusters: Motorcycle Water Ski
programme.desc: Jamie puts his life on the line to test the myth that a motorcycle driving at highway speeds can drive across the surface of a lake.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon
programme.desc: In this ballistics bonanza, Adam and Jamie ask if supersonic ping pong can go lethally wrong, while Kari, Grant and Tory light the frozen fuse on a cannon made of ice!

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle is the mysterious stretch of water that's home to some of the world's greatest mysteries, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind this strange and deadly place.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle is the mysterious stretch of water that's home to some of the world's greatest mysteries, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind this strange and deadly place.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle is the mysterious stretch of water that's home to some of the world's greatest mysteries, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind this strange and deadly place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of King Arthur
programme.desc: Satellites spot a 2,000-year-old structure in Wales, that some suspect has a secret connection to King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Pamela and Michael fall back in love, twenty years after the high school sweethearts break up. But the issues that first drove them apart have intensified over the years—and their second chance at love turns deadly.

programme.title: A Fatal Confession: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Daniel Villegas confessed to killing two teenagers in El Paso, Texas. He was sentenced to life in prison. Keith investigates to see if Daniel was forced to confess to a shooting he knew nothing about.

programme.title: True Conviction: Witness to a Nightmare
programme.desc: A Philadelphia mother is murdered at home, execution-style- right before her child's eyes. The hunt for her killer leads to a maddening series of dead ends until months later, when the case breaks in an astonishing direction.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder at the Barbershop
programme.desc: A beloved Pensacola barber is gunned down in his shop in broad daylight. DNA evidence left at the scene may hold the key to solving this murder mystery.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: When LeRyan Nicholson's sisters investigate his disappearance, they uncover a series of secrets that lead them to the heartbreaking truth.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.desc: Robert Jeffery lost his entire drug business in a fire and robbed a bank to pay off his supplier.

programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate

programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Chopped: Tapas Time
programme.desc: Time to shake things up in a big/small way! The chefs find out that this competition has a tapas theme. All courses of the meal must be composed of small plates!

programme.title: Chopped: Fig Out
programme.desc: The chefs find two fishy ingredients in the first basket. Then in the entree round, beef kidneys and spiny leaves must be combined. The finalists then make dessert from figs and lemon verbena.

programme.title: Chopped: Thrill of the Grill
programme.desc: The chefs learn that they must grill something in each round of this competition. For their appetizers, the chefs discover watermelon and wine coolers in the basket. A beautiful cut of beef and tedious-to-prep beans await the chefs.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing for Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Out
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is going hog wild for the most insane pig roasts in the country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wild Yeast Risin'
programme.desc: First the pandemic, then the zombies, then the nukes and now: desolation and a giant dinosaur-thing. Luckily there is still yeast in the air, and Alton proves that with a wild sourdough in the kitchen along with cheese crackers and waffles.

programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Chinatown Ghost Story
programme.desc: As Donnie becomes increasingly jealous of April and Casey's relationship, April is kidnapped by an evil spirit that intends to drain her powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Into Dimension X!
programme.desc: At home, Mikey always messes things up, but when the Turtles go to the bizarre realm of Dimension X, he's the only one who can figure the place out.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Invasion
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Within the Woods
programme.desc: The team comes to grips with the possibility that Leo won't get better, while things only get worse: a new mutant captures Raph.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Foot Too Big
programme.desc: When the turtles encounter Bigfoot, they must protect him from a hunter.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Lost Signal
programme.desc: The Rangers intercept a mysterious message from outer space and Zayto is desperate to know if it was sent from his home planet. Unable to decipher it and losing hope, he remembers another important message from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When the team discovers a Kraang ship buried underneath April's house they also find her mom. As April reconnects with her mother they begin to wonder if she is all that she seems.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Temp/ Parent Trap
programme.desc: When Bocarter's father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Dave's help, locking the two families in a heated competition.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair
programme.desc: Continual distractions almost derail part of a science project others are depending on; a trip to the bookstore finds the comfiest chair in the world, which may have mystical powers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Man's Worst Friend
programme.desc: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy be replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Micecapades/ Formula for Disaster
programme.desc: Poof turns Timmy and Vicki into cartoon cat and mouse characters and mayhem follows.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Fairy Tales
programme.desc: In order to put a restless Poof to sleep, Wanda decides to read him a book of fairy tales.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Oh Brother!/ What's the Difference?
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a perfect older brother, but his brother is so perfect that he is boring Timmy to tears; Timmy wishes everything in school was mixed up like a "find it" puzzle book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Big Wanda/ Moving Day
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his Mom could sell a house to anyone; Wanda is called in to run the business.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Adventure!
programme.desc: The future of adventuring hangs in the balance as the Duck family uncovers earth-shattering secrets in a final standoff with the Fiendish Organization for World Larceny (F.O.W.L.).

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Dream Team! Tag Battle!
Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.desc: Pageant queen Anastagia wants to choose her own dress for once, but she needs to battle her mother's strong influence first. Christalyne must broaden her colour pallet to please traditional Indian in-laws. Lisa butts heads with her mom over an ivory gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For His Consideration

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Smother's Day
programme.desc: Samantha wants a dress that shows off her tattoo, but her mom hates the tattoo and wants to keep it covered. Singer Vanessa needs a 1930's dress for her jazz-inspired wedding. With only a month to go, Aja's fitting leaves no margin for error.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More, More, More!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Always the Pageant Girl...

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Dress -- New Beginning

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Kleinfeld Family Affair

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jan/ Bebe
programme.desc: Jan is in denial about her hoarding and her daughters don't dare talk about throwing anything out. Bebe had a privileged life, but after her husband was murdered, things began to fall apart. Now, she even steals when she's in church.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The Darkest Shift on the Scariest Night
programme.desc: Halloween provides a fitting backdrop to a night on the job that includes some chilling calls. Captain Kevin leads the fire fighters battling a blaze that's engulfed a house, and hopefully nothing more. Becca responds to a call she hoped to never get.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Return to the Big Easy
programme.desc: Titus and Holly highlight some of the most memorable moments from past seasons that show the New Orleans medics in action.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: For a Good Time Call Ivy
programme.desc: Darrell is up to his old tricks again, but it's Ivy who ends up pranking the competition while Rene and Casey space out.

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR
programme.desc: Ivy is racing against time to score a locker and get home; otherwise, he'll be in the doghouse. Rene spends the most money of anyone, but it's Darrell and Brandon who paint their way to success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Nuthin' But a 'G' Thang, Rene
programme.desc: Rene and Casey plan to buy big and fill their truck, no matter the cost. Gossip surrounds Jarrod and Brandi's Long Beach store. Meanwhile, Darrell and Brandon jump ship, and Ivy gets a score that could change his career.

programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Double-Cross With Blake Griffin: Virtual Insanity
Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Double-Cross With Blake Griffin: Flash Attack
Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.
