programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Conclusion, $50,000 Pay Day
programme.desc: It's the $50,000 grand finale and one of the returning champs is destined to win the grand prize and considerable bragging rights! Some unusual clams and a decadent meat are part of the culinary riddle to be solved in the first round.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rockin' New Orleans
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up funky joints in New Orleans that both locals and tourists are digging into, and they're servin' up all kinds of flavor.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rockstar Chefs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's meeting up with rock star chefs taking center stage in the kitchen. There's everything from a dynamite D.C. deli, to the bomb breakfast in Baltimore, to killer Creole in Los Angeles, and out-of-bounds biscuits in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: West Coast Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy goes to Cali for a mouth watering variety of killer cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Land And Sea
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri crosses the country to reel in some surf and dig into some turf. From carnivorous cravings to serious seafood, these places are chock-full of flavor that's sure to please every palate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Alaskan Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads to Fairbanks for an Alaskan culinary adventure. There's authentic German specialties at a super funky food truck, a food-and-music jamfest featuring Cuban favorites and a local hot spot servin' up comfort with meatball subs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Po' Boys
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a drive down memory lane and revisits a German joint in Brighton, Colo., known for their killer kraut and signature sausage specials. Then, at a stop in the Midwest, a mod-Mex menu is now showcasing mole smothered pork chop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legends of Texas
programme.desc: Guy is cruising the lone star state for a bite of Texas style triple d. From gumbo to Greek, pizza to burgers, and tasty twists from Dallas to Houston.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's social media crew is in the kitchen! After filming Trisha's online streaming show, Coffee Talk, the gang hangs around to enjoy each other's company, great food, and of course, coffee!

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Broadway Down South
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Trisha Yearwood's talented friend, singer and actress Kristin Chenoweth, visits Nashville for a Southern Broadway experience.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: My Kind Of Town: Chicago
programme.desc: One of Valerie Bertinelli's good friends is a recent Chicago transplant, living in Los Angeles but always extolling the virtues of his hometown eats. She invites him and some other Chi-town ex-locals over for a taste of their hometown.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Cooks So-Cal Style
programme.desc: Valerie and her longtime housekeeper, Elia, cook So-Cal style Mexican recipes, just they did when Wolfie was a little boy. They make Chicken Enchiladas with Classic Sauce, a "Casa Vega" Salad, Roasted Salsa and Smoky Margaritas with Mezcal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ranchin' and Cookin'
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is geared up for an action-packed morning of ranching and get-ahead cooking. She stocks the freezer with a marvelous meatball and polenta casserole, awesome everything bagel bombs with everything bagel seasoning.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Talk
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is celebrating the opening of her new sweet shop with a lineup of treats and sundaes. She makes incredible, old-fashioned Jeweled Divinity and shares the secrets to two of the over-the-top sundaes she serves at the parlor.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Where's the Meat?
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is headed to the lodge to make a fabulous meat-free Tex Mex frittata, and she's sharing other epic meat-free meals, too.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 16-Minute Chicken Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making 16-minute chicken dinners in a race against time. She starts with chicken fajita pasta, followed by honey plum soy stir fry. Cutlets make an amazing spicy chicken sandwich, and there's a shortcut in the green goddess chicken salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Yeh-Hagen Family Games
programme.desc: Molly Yeh kicks off the first official Yeh-Hagen Family Games with a big, delicious bang. She makes carnitas walking tacos and Mexican street corn-loaded tots, and for dessert, there are coconut mango pops and ooey-gooey s'mores brownies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Brunch All Day
programme.desc: Molly is having a brunch party with a few of her former bridesmaids. She makes blueberry blintzes, a breakfast salad with soft cooked eggs and crispy walnut sausage patties.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Backyard Fair
programme.desc: Kardea Brown sets up carnival games and delicious fair food in the backyard. She makes lowcountry seafood nachos served in baskets, mini corn dog muffins, funnel cake bites topped with strawberry sauce and chocolate dipped frozen bananas on a stick.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: NOLA Brunch
programme.desc: Kardea Brown is whipping up a tasty brunch with a spicy twist. Her mom Pat is coming over for her favorite meal inspired by her top bucket list destination: New Orleans.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Starch Madness
programme.desc: The Kitchen's epic, starch-filled menu leaves no carb behind. It starts off with beer cheese soup in a bread bowl with kielbasa 'Croutons' and then includes a pierogi pizza, fettuccine alfredo pie and a fun pasta personality test.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Meze Fete
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites some of his favorite chefs to the ranch to celebrate the exotic flavors and spices of the Middle East with small plates called mezes. Alex Guarnaschelli makes a delicious mix of savory and sweet with her spicy pork burger.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Tyler Florence challenges the six remaining food truck teams to practice their survival skills by starting a fire to make delicious s'mores, and the judges for the taste test are the other teams.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri send three all-star chefs two boxes of groceries and GGG games and challenge them to reinvent classic food duos. First, the chefs make surf-and-turf dishes. Then food magnets determine their ingredients for a fried sandwich.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: New School vs. Old School
programme.desc: Guy Fieri wants to know which culinary form is best, so he has invited two old-school and two new-school chefs to test their skills against each other.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Finding a Felon
programme.desc: In Texas, Game Wardens are the guardians of the state's wildlife. Game Warden Herchman saves an owl, while Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up to work a case in an archery-only county. Game Wardens Benge and King investigate a poaching case.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Mom: Twinkle Lights and Grandma Shoes

programme.title: Mom: Fish Town and Too Many Thank You's

programme.title: Movie: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: A long forgotten ring of power resurfaces and endangers the existence of mankind and the other mythical creatures that inhabit Middle Earth. A fellowship embarks on a quest to the mountains were the ring was forged in the hopes of destroying it.

programme.title: The Simpsons: They Saved Lisa's Brain
programme.desc: Homer gets everyone to embrace humiliation in order to win a contest; Lisa joins MENSA.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Tap Dance in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa's dance teacher, a former actress, steers her towards tap instead of tango dancing.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bye, Bye Nerdie
programme.desc: Lisa's attempts to befriend a new student at Springfield Elementary results in constant bullying, leading her on a crusade to find out just what makes bullies tick.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIV
programme.desc: Homer assumes the role of the Grim Reaper after bludgeoning the ghastly ghoul to death.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Future-Drama
programme.desc: An astrology machine gives Bart and Lisa a peek into their final days of high school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eternal Moonshine of the Simpson Mind
programme.desc: Homer wakens on a snowy winter morning and has to reconstruct his memory of the previous night when he finds that Marge and the kids are nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job
programme.desc: Lisa becomes disheartened when she learns the shocking truth behind the 'tween lit' industry and her beloved fantasy novel characters, but Homer decides to cash in on the craze and forms a team to group-write the next 'tween lit' hit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frink Gets Testy
programme.desc: Fearing that the end of the world is near, Mr. Burns tasks Dr. Frink with testing all of Springfield to determine who is worth saving. The results shake the Simpson family to their core.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh
programme.desc: Marge becomes Director of Springfield's local theater, armed with Lisa's script resembling 'Hamilton.' Meanwhile, Homer joins a baby class with Maggie, where he takes a liking to supervisor Chloe.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frinkcoin
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the topic of Lisa's 'Most Interesting Person I Know' essay. Lisa instead chooses Professor Frink. While Lisa works on the essay, Frink develops a cryptocurrency, overtaking Mr. Burn's title of richest man in Springfield.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: One Ocean
programme.desc: A journey from the intense heat of the tropics to the planet's frozen poles. Life has spread to almost every part of the ocean, but there are many different worlds within it, and each presents unique challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coasts
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Making Worlds
programme.desc: Steve Backshall reveals the incredible influence that insects and their close relatives have on our planet's many ecosystems. In South America, the landscape has been created almost solely by one team of insects: grass-cutter ants.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Trapped in a world unlike any other he has seen, the Doctor faces the greatest challenge of his many lives. Pursued by the fearsome creature known only as the Veil, he must attempt the impossible.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hell Bent
programme.desc: A Time Lord known as the Doctor uses the TARDIS to aid others throughout time and space.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl in the Fireplace

programme.title: Doctor Who: Blink
programme.desc: A young woman finds cryptic messages from 1969 coming from a stranger called the Doctor when people start disappearing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: A brand-new Doctor crashes to Earth with no time to ponder his new face and personality - he must save humanity from an alien threat. The Doctor also meets his new companion, Amy Pond, and she's been waiting for him a very long time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vincent and the Doctor
programme.desc: Amy finds herself battling a deadly alien in France with none other than Vincent Van Gogh.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Fugitive of the Judoon
programme.desc: Ko Sho Blo! Trigger-happy space police the Judoonare targeting 21st century Gloucester. The Doctor, Yaz, Ryan and Graham race back to Earth in order to prevent them doing too much damage to the cathedral city.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revolution of the Daleks
programme.desc: With the Doctor locked away in an alien prison, Yaz, Ryan and Graham are on Earth having to carry on with their lives without her. However, they soon discover a disturbing plan forming involving a Dalek. How can you fight a Dalek without the Doctor?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor
programme.desc: In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery. In 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England. Meanwhile, somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: Who Killed the Lyon Sisters?
programme.desc: Featuring bestselling author Mark Bowden, secret police recordings and first-person accounts, this doc explores the haunting 1975 disappearance of 2 sisters from a Maryland mall and the predatory backwoods clan that may have hidden the crime for 40 years.

programme.title: In Pursuit: The Missing
programme.desc: In the picturesque town of Cape Coral, Florida, Cal investigates the disappearance of 29-year-old single mother Lauren Dumolo before heading to Ft. Lauderdale to uncover the truth behind a mysterious case involving a missing teen named Sophie Reeder.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Dance with the Devil
programme.desc: A New Jersey woman with a thirst for fun takes the plunge and buys a home close to her family. The wrong houseguest will prove deadly though, as police dig through her life to find an enemy that is hiding very close.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Tangled Up in Red
programme.desc: One woman is killed and her best friend hospitalized in two separate attacks in a normally quiet Georgia suburb. Investigators digging for the truth uncover connections that show some members of these two families were much closer than anyone thought.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Rock Hill
programme.desc: Billy Wayne Cope, a devoted father and husband, is charged in the brutal murder of his 12-year old daughter, Amanda. After giving four mis-matched confessions, his case seemed all but lost, until DNA evidence points directly to someone else.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Rock Hill
programme.desc: Billy Wayne Cope, a devoted father and husband, is charged in the brutal murder of his 12-year old daughter, Amanda. After giving four mis-matched confessions, his case seemed all but lost, until DNA evidence points directly to someone else.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Night on the Parkway
programme.desc: In the great smoky mountains of North Carolina, Billy Carter raises his daughters Crystal and Misty. When a body is found on the scenic Blue Ridge Parkway, this family's piece of paradise becomes a nightmare they relive again and again.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Side Business
programme.desc: When the body of a professor and family man is discovered in the office of a used car dealership, Detective Postiglione solves the puzzle after recalling a specific clue that gave the killer he spots, the window of opportunity.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Speaking for the Dead
programme.desc: In 'the city too busy to hate,' investigators at Atlanta Homicide have three murders on their hands after a woman is gunned down and two teens are shot in their car.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Creek Bottom
programme.desc: College student and aspiring teacher Tammy Crowe has everything to live for, but on her way to a friend's dinner party, Tammy's life takes an unexpectedly devastating and violent turn.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Alexandria, VA: for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack! Ali kicks things off in style with a guilt free southern fried chicken biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Stuffed In Spokane

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Savory San Antonio
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in San Antonio, Texas, looking for deals on breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Oklahoma City, Okla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Typically known for its rugged Western roots, OKC has a food scene that's surprisingly multi-cultural.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Food Truck Frenzy
programme.desc: Whether it's mouthwatering burgers, tacos with a twist, or delicious desserts, there's a food truck for just about anything you're craving.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson digs into one of the most indulgent, flavorful and versatile meats in the world.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco: Second Bite
programme.desc: San Francisco's food scene is so impressive, it deserves a second trip. From Japanese hot pots and hand-crafted lasagna to ice cream made from locally sourced ingredients, Andrew explores the city's culinary history and diversity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The New Crew/ Raiders of the Lost BARK
programme.desc: The Pugs and the crew are on a mission to make sure two new puppies have fun at Playcare! The airline loses Dr. G's robot dog, so Bingo and Rolly are on the case!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Pajama Party/ The Bunny Bunch
programme.desc: When Mia and Lucky can't get along, Pip and Freddy try to broker the peace with a pajama party! Freddy learns that twin zebras are unique in their own ways.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Stop That Spinosaurus! / The Spookasaurus
programme.desc: A rampaging dinosaur threatens to cause havoc. When Jon gets spooked by a campfire story about a legendary dinosaur, he doesn't want to admit it to Miguel and Min.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: What to Expect When You're Egg-specting/ Ruffin' It
programme.desc: While in New Zealand, the pugs try to return a large egg before it hatches. When Chloe and Keia lose a special canoe paddle, the pups embark on a wilderness adventure to find it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Junior Junior Fliers/ Good Vibrations
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must get their delivery back from precocious kid storks, Zed, Red, and Jed. Pip and Freddy become 'helicopter parents'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Wild/ The Sunshine Pups
programme.desc: The Pugs go on a mission to find a bear so Chloe and the Lil' Nature Scouts get their wild animal badge. After a week of rain ends, Bingo and Rolly organize a game in the sun.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cookie Mistake
programme.desc: After Phoebe chooses Billy to accompany her to their favorite cookie factory's exclusive tasting event, Max and Nora are determined to sneak in and get to the delicious treats first.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Side-Kicking and Screaming
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe secretly employ their parents' former sidekick to ease their busy schedule, but the twins' bickering and inability to share provokes an unexpected response from their new sidekick.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Nowhere to Slide
programme.desc: The Thunder family splits up for the night when the boys decide to survive 24 hours in the wilderness, while the girls try to bond over some of Barb's favorite farm activities from her childhood.

programme.title: The Thundermans: 21 Dump Street
programme.desc: After Max is dumped, Phoebe tries to cheer him up by introducing him to another girl. However, Max's date turns out to be an intense animal activist, who steals Dr. Colosso when she sees Max's 'cruel' treatment of him.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Mad Max: Beyond Thunderhome
programme.desc: Max finally declares his independence from his parents' house rules and moves to his friend's house, where they only rule is that there are no rules. However, ultimate freedom quickly becomes more than Max can handle.

programme.title: The Thundermans: All the President's Thunder-Men
programme.desc: After their requests drive Kickbutt to quit, Max and Phoebe get what they want when Hank is named the new SuperPresident.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Lost Signal
programme.desc: The Rangers intercept a mysterious message from outer space and Zayto is desperate to know if it was sent from his home planet. Unable to decipher it and losing hope, he remembers another important message from the past.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: New Recruits
programme.desc: Void Knight’s new general, Boomtower, tries to steal a mysterious Orb from the city museum. When the Rangers struggle to stop him, they get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?: The Tale of the Darkhouse
programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?: The Tale of the Darkhouse
programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Code Yellow

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe Is Untied/ Something Smells
programme.desc: Squid is put in charge of getting Pat a new pair of shoes; Bob eats sea-onion ice cream.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat has a secret box that drives SpongeBob crazy; Squid recruits SpongeBob for his band.

programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fools in April/ Neptune's Spatula
programme.desc: It's April Fool's Day, so SpongeBob gets to play harmless pranks for the entire day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Croaking
programme.desc: An upset Mikey runs away from home and befriends a Mutant Frog in the woods. When he learns its Frog family plans to attack the human world, he has to figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dream Beavers
programme.desc: Creatures that feed off dreams trap the Turtles in their own dreams as April and Casey must find a way to wake them up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Race With the Demon
programme.desc: Casey and Donnie bond over building Casey's new hot rod, but their newfound friendship is tested by Speed Demon, a hot-rodding mutant who is terrorizing the roads.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Eyes of the Chimera
programme.desc: When Casey, Raph, Mikey and Donnie are captured by a new mutant, both April and Leo must overcome disabilities in order to save them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vision Quest

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: New Recruits
programme.desc: Void Knight’s new general, Boomtower, tries to steal a mysterious Orb from the city museum. When the Rangers struggle to stop him, they get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Drama Club: Drama in the Drama Club
The Substitute: Shaun White

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Popcorn Monster/ Game of Drones

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails

programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: 1%
programme.desc: The 99% is ganging up on Cartman.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: Crack Baby Athletic Association
programme.desc: Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman's new business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: Movie: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: Christopher and Cathy live together as man and wife with Cathy's two sons who are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship. But when a woman who turns out to be their mother moves in next door, things unravel.

programme.title: Movie: Ruby
programme.desc: A young girl is filled with hope as love blooms with her high school sweetheart, but dark family secrets begin to reveal themselves when his parents forbid him to see her.

programme.title: Movie: Pearl in the Mist
programme.desc: When twin sisters Ruby and Giselle are sent away to an exclusive all girls boarding school, Ruby is hopeful for a new start with her sister.

programme.title: Movie: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: Four siblings who, after their father's unexpected death, are convinced by their mother to hide in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune. When her visits wane, the children are left to endure their grandmother.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: Sharon and Major Crimes rush to capitalize on a shocking discovery made in a church. Stephanie and Sanchez's connection grows as they bond over lost loved ones. Rusty learns from Provenza that his biological mother's ex, Gary, is a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: After finding another victim, Sharon angrily turns her attention back to former LAPD Det. Mark Hickman, who has a secret that may be a motive for murder. Meanwhile, the possible gang war ratchets up a notch with three more murders.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Best Laid Plans

programme.desc: Jodi Arias is a pretty, small town waitress and aspiring photographer. Travis Alexander is a handsome, devout Mormon, and successful businessman. Months after their sexually charged romance began, Travis was found brutally murdered in his shower at home.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Four years after the vicious killing of Travis Alexander, his ex-girlfriend Jodi Arias stands trial for his murder. Millions of people are captivated by the lurid details of their relationship.

programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.desc: The manhunt for escaped prisoners Richard Matt and David Sweat was growing, expanding from the United States to Canada. Thousands of leads were being followed, but weeks into the search, there was still no sign of the missing men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: The Devil's Woods
programme.desc: The frigid Montana wilderness pushes the survivalists' partnership over the edge. As they struggle to work together, wildlife including bears and aggressive moose circle their camp. Plummeting temperatures create the need for drastic action.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: The Devil's Woods

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Sand Trapped

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stars Against the Storm
programme.desc: All-Star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest. Aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous. Even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a Special Forces veteran risk hypothermia at every turn as they take on Canada with no clothes. Bitter cold, torrential rain and wandering bears and moose make every night a struggle and an obstinate chipmunk pushes their patience.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A self-taught survivalist and an impulsive black belt take on the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua. The environment features a variety of deadly predators, but when one of them fails to pull their weight, it becomes clear their worst enemy could be each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Sand Trapped

programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a California surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a reliable water source to ensure their survival.

programme.title: American Chopper: Monster Diesel Bike
programme.desc: OCC builds an industrial themed bike for Aaron Equipment Company.

programme.title: American Chopper: Christopher and Dana Reeve Foundation Bike

programme.title: American Chopper: Iraq Star Foundation Bike

programme.desc: Richard and Aaron pick up a '64 Dodge Sweptline that's a mishmash of parts. A '32 Ford Roadster Richard forgot he bought rolls in, but it's up to Christie to seal the deal with the prospective buyer. KC hits the road with Richard to buy a '65 Mustang.

programme.desc: Francesco is living in fear of his girlfriend's cat, Pootie. Sandy and Phil were happily married until they adopted their cat Woody. Sandy and Phil are convinced Woody terrorized their deceased cat Velvet so much that he killed her with stress.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Dangerous Africans
programme.desc: Steve travels through Africa on foot to study some of the most notoriously dangerous African animals. He is charged by huge elephants, rolls up to a massive herd of buffalo, intimidates a pride of lions and is chased by large hippos.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: First-Time Mom
programme.desc: Beautiful six-year-old okapi, K'Tusha, is nearing the end of her first pregnancy. Keepers are hoping her first baby will help to conserve this highly-endangered species from the rainforests of central Africa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Handle With Care
programme.desc: A tomistoma, a freshwater crocodilian, stops laying eggs and a team of keepers scrambles to treat her. The veterinary team has to rescue a baby antelope that isn't getting the care it needs from its mother. And Mert the Goose takes a field trip.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: View From Above III
programme.desc: Pete and his crew gather 'round the campfire to answer questions from fans, and recall the most magnificent builds, heartwarming memories, and downright ridiculous moments they've enjoyed in the world of treehouses.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-a-Tank!
programme.desc: ATM gets a surprise call from their favorite customer, Shaquille O'Neal. The Retired NBA Super Star loves his first tank and is back for a second! Incorporating his love of Hookah and an Egyptian theme the guys build a tank fit for a Pharaoh.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Clean Slate
programme.desc: Former adopters want to expand their family and adopt Caleb, a puppy that Tania rescued at birth, but Tia is unsure he will fit in with their other dog. When a local gets arrested, his dog is left behind and VRC is called in to help.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Connection
programme.desc: A senior dog is given a chance at a forever home. A rescue is complicated by the presence of two dogs. Later, the family discovers their personal dogs' origins when Tia surprises them with DNA test kits.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Toughest Job in Texas
programme.desc: An alligator poacher brags online and Wardens go after him. Down on the border Wardens pull illegal nets from the river while looking for drug smugglers.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: Movie: Rings

programme.title: Movie: Deep Blue Sea 2
programme.desc: A group of scientists are targeted by bio-engineered bull sharks.

programme.title: Movie: Ouija
programme.desc: When their friend is brutally killed in an accident, a group of teenagers attempt to contact her through a spirit board. When the group becomes tormented by malevolent forces, they must figure out how to break the ties they made with the spirit world.

programme.title: Movie: Priest
programme.desc: While disobeying church laws, a priest hunts down vampires who have kidnapped his niece.

programme.title: Love It or List It: No Love for the Land
programme.desc: A woman who agreed to move into her new husband's bachelor pad when they first got married is ready for a change. While Dad and son are in outdoor heaven on their two acres, Mom wants an updated family home with a new kitchen and ensuite bathroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: Closer to Mom
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple is looking for a vacation home in Laurel to be closer to her mom, and their ideal house needs space for hosting crawfish boils. Ben and Erin transform a dated home into a modern oasis complete with two kitchens and a spectacular pool.

programme.title: Home Town: Retreat Yourself
programme.desc: Angie took a huge leap of faith when she quit her New York job to work as a producer on 'Home Town.' After falling in love with Laurel, Mississippi, she's ready to make it her permanent address, and Ben and Erin help their boss find her dream home.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: There's Just Something About a Porch
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a historic home in the country with a porch and plenty of green space. Ben and Erin transform their new home into a classic, dogtrot-style house full of historic charm and Southern touches.

programme.title: Home Town: From the Big Apple to the Little Catfish
programme.desc: A surgeon and his wife are moving to Laurel from New York City, and their all-in budget goes a long way in the Mississippi town. Ben and Erin pay homage to the historic property's original elements and peculiar charm to design an amazing family home.

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: From the Big Apple to the Little Catfish

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Everybody Wants a Porch
programme.desc: A couple moves from Arizona to Mississippi in search of a slower pace of life and their forever home. They have an all-in budget of $250,000 and a wish list that includes a home with historic Southern architecture and a spacious kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits
programme.desc: A Canadian couple looks to purchase a vacation home that will one day become their retirement home. With an all-in budget of $140,000, Ben and Erin show them two Craftsman cottages.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Good Bones: Smelly Shotgun House to Chic Downtown Home
programme.desc: Mina Starsiak and Karen E. Laine take on an old shotgun-style home near downtown Indianapolis, and even though they've been renovating shotgun homes for years, this house is quite the stinker.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Backyard Barn for Karen
programme.desc: Karen and Mina are tackling a special project, Karen's new barn-shaped guesthouse that she has been dreaming of for years.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Brickyard Brick House
programme.desc: Mina and Karen revamp a historic brick house in a rising area of south Indianapolis. The house is in bad shape. Luckily, they have a healthy budget of $200,000 and they are going to need every dime.

programme.title: Good Bones: MJ's Dream Home
programme.desc: Design assistant MJ, and his husband recently bought their first home, and Mina and Karen want to make MJ's dreams a reality. The duo works to blend traditional and modern styles, but MJ may have to compromise to stay in budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Old Biker Bar
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back on Talbott Street in Old Southside neighbourhood at a house that used to be an old motorcycle biker bar that they're turning back into a single-family home. The home will have a massive addition and pay tribute to its biker roots.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: 90 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Soon-to-be newlyweds are ready to make their first big joint decision about building a home. Real estate developing duo Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are on hand to help the couple decide on their dream home's location, size and style.

programme.desc: A woman has a brief affair with pool cleaner, but quickly turns down his continued advances. Insulted at being rejected, he starts dating her high school age daughter, using her as an unsuspecting pawn in a twisted game of revenge.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Old Man Corey

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn in Space
programme.desc: Explore the cosmos with the Pawn Stars when a cast signed helmet from the 1960s TV show 'Lost in Space' orbits the shop. Then, a strange, antique object surfaces and has Rick and Corey scratching their heads.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Big Fish in a Small Pawn

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Bombsight for Sore Eyes

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Undead
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars stake a claim to an original 1800's Vampire defense kit. Then, Rick gets a chance to buy a work from one of America's most famous artists, James Whistler. Next, Rick takes a look at a James Bond prop from the movie GoldenEye.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Seas

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Boats and Bros

programme.title: Dateline: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susan Casey, a loving mother of four, vanishes just 20 steps from her apartment in a small Montana town. Police soon discover that three men in her life were on her street in the early morning hour when she disappeared.

programme.title: Dateline: Footprint in the Dust

programme.title: NCIS: Yankee White

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Citadel
programme.desc: DEA agent Talia Del Campo turns to the NCIs team for help after her partner is murdered. Also, after Kensi grows suspicious that Deeks is hiding something, he surprises her by introducing her to his mother.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Driving Miss Diaz
programme.desc: The team investigates a 20-year-old Peruvian massacre after a well-known fashion model, believed to be one of the survivors, is now a potential target. Also, Kensi goes undercover as the model's assistant and Deeks as her chauffeur.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Command and Control

programme.title: NCIS: The Immortals

programme.title: NCIS: The Curse
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate the death of a lieutenant almost 10 years after his death.

programme.title: NCIS: High Seas
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team board an aircraft carrier to investigate a sailor's drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: Sub Rosa
programme.desc: Gibbs and Todd board a submarine when they suspect that there is an impostor on board.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trans-Fat
programme.desc: Peter is mistakenly identified as transgender, which leads to an unexpected event and an important learning lesson.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy

programme.title: Family Guy: HTTPete

programme.desc: After Peter falls into a coma, Peter meets God face-to-face, which leads him to ask some of life's tough questions.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite

programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Torture Chamber

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye

programme.title: Nightmare Fairytale

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: Nightmare Fairytale
programme.desc: When Casey Ann Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele vanish, people assume they have just ran away with each other. However, as time passes, it becomes clear that Casey an TJ may not have disappeared on their own volition.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: A young woman is found savagely murdered in her new home. Will the trail of clues police discovered lead them to her killer?

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Handsome Devil
programme.desc: When a Luzerne County detective follows up on a series of home invasions as a courtesy to a friend and veteran, his investigation brings him face-to-face with a serial sociopath guilty of far more than mere breaking and entering.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: A long haul trucker disappears just before New Years'. Thirteen years later a tax fuel auditor goes missing. The investigation into one case expands into another, and police uncover one of the most bizarre and grisly crime scenes they've ever seen.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Always Be Mine
programme.desc: A young mother is shot execution-style in her kitchen while her daughter cries in the next room. It will take a full team effort from the investigators and prosecution to wade through the intricate web of lies the killer weaves to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Convicted by a Hair
programme.desc: In 2011, 19-year old KC Grondin got his first girlfriend, but later that same year, he was charged with her murder. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by KC's passionate parents, who are convinced he was the victim of a rush to judgment.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: A 36-year-old mother is savagely murdered while her 7-year-old niece is asleep in the next room.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: George Ferribee, a loving son led astray by addiction, is found executed. When Lt. Joe Kenda learns the victim had recently been kidnapped, he assumes the crimes are related... but soon discovers things are much more complicated than he had expected.

programme.title: Homicide City: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When a hard-working, pregnant mother vanishes, detectives stumble on a love-triangle that may explain the secrets behind her death.

programme.title: Dateline: Valentine's Day Mystery
programme.desc: A murder on Valentine's Day spurns a dramatic trial of a case with unexpected twists and surprise ending.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Yuppie Murder
programme.desc: A young couple, The Stuarts, are robbed and shot in Boston. Carol and her unborn child are killed. Charles survives to describe their black assailant, inflaming racial tensions, until a surprise witness comes forward with a story that blows open the case.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fireworks on Fury Lane
programme.desc: A firefighter moves into a family-friendly neighbourhood with his wife and child, but the rambunctious teens living next door drive him over the edge.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble
programme.desc: Failing to stop Kim Il Sung's forces on land, MacArthur devises an amphibious assault at Inchon with the intelligence aid of naval officer Lt. Eugene Clark.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Edge of War: MacArthur's Great Gamble
programme.desc: Failing to stop Kim Il Sung's forces on land, MacArthur devises an amphibious assault at Inchon with the intelligence aid of naval officer Lt. Eugene Clark.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
