programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Otter Tail Transformation
programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: From LA to Lake Tuscaloosa
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Next Up: Niagara
programme.desc: A couple seek a property along Lake Ontario in Niagara County that could be an escape for the family, but needs some work. They are no strangers to renovations, but with a tight budget they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Tastes of Texas
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson discovers the best food that Texas has to offer. Whether it's state legends like chili and barbecue, or flavors from south of the border, it's time to fill your plate in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Slow Down, Catboy! / Gekko's Special Rock
programme.desc: Three friends turn into superheroes at night when they put on their pyjamas.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Diagnosis Not Even Close-Is / Bronty's Twisted Tail
programme.desc: While Doc is at Emmie’s for a play date, Hallie and Stuffy try to diagnose Robot Ray. Stuffy accidentally causes an accident that results in Bronty's tail getting bent.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puppies and Pandas / Orange You Glad?
programme.desc: The Pugs are on a mission to recreate a video of a panda sneezing in China. Lollie enlists the Pugs to fetch some oranges for Ana's daily orange juice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War

programme.title: The Loud House: The Crying Dame/ Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying, the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic, but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

programme.title: The Loud House: Legends/ Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and are excited for a day of bonding. Lincoln wants to go to the mall and has to bring his sisters along.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode

programme.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?: The Tale of the Darkhouse
programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidtastic Voyage/ That's No Lady

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward
programme.desc: Squidward gets surgery done on his face after a door is slammed on him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Fancy/ Krabby Road

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far

programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Adventures in Big Baby Bun Sitting/ Crumbskull

programme.title: Breadwinners: Bad to the Duck Bone/ Rodeo Ducks

programme.title: Breadwinners: Wrath of the Pizza Lord/ Shrunken Ducks

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!

programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls
programme.desc: Ford discovers Bill's true motives and then a final confrontation with Bill leads to the Pines family's ultimate fate and greatest sacrifice.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: Three Big Problems/ Cereal Criminals

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: It's a Colorful Life/ Larry Manor

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: I'm Still Super!/ Balls!
programme.desc: Penn returns to the world of superheroes, only to discover the heroes have been turned evil by Captain Super Captain's evil twin brother. The team zaps into a world where they are sports balls.

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: Chuckle City 500/ Rock and Roll
programme.desc: Penn, Sashi and Boon return to Chuckle City to compete in a clown-style street race that determines who will be the next Mayor. Then, Penn is excited to be a super spy agent, but finds out he's actually a caveman spy with only low tech gadgets.

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: Where Dragons Dare / Rip-Penn
programme.desc: Penn must overcome his jealousy of popular fellow cadet Blaze to complete his mission and finish at the top of his class at Dragon Flight School.

programme.title: Penn Zero: Part Time Hero: The Princess Most Fair/ Hail Larry
programme.desc: The team zaps into a musical fairy-tale land where they must sing whatever they say and their true feelings come out in song. When Rippen stays home sick, Larry fills in as part-time villain and becomes a giant overlord of evil.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: Barry and Lainey's wedding date is right around the corner, and Beverly is in her element as she tries to make everything perfect for her schmoopie's big day. Geoff is concerned about Adam's shortcomings as a wedding videographer.

programme.title: Mom: Lockjaw and a Liquid Diet
programme.desc: Christy tries to help when Bonnie gets into trouble with the IRS but realizing she's in over her head, she encourages Bonnie to seek help from her newfound brother.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Bullying
programme.desc: When Eve is suspended from school for calling a boy a bad name, Mike is surprised name calling would be considered bullying. Meanwhile Ryan finally gets a job, but when he buys a motorcycle, Kristin thinks he won't have extra money to help her and Boyd.

programme.title: Mom: Fun Girl Stuff and Eternal Salvation
programme.desc: Christy blames Bonnie when Roscoe announces he wants to go live with his father.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Going Batty

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Sea Turtles of Pongara
programme.desc: Jack is in Pongara where he sees one-ton leatherback sea turtles coming to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Turtle Sense
programme.desc: Caroline is excited to go out on her first date with Bobby, but she has nervous jitters when she realizes Max will be alone and in charge of the dessert bar. Also, Sophie and Oleg decide to mix things up and go out on a date instead of staying in.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Tease Time
programme.desc: As Caroline prepares for her third date with Bobby, she decides to spice things up by taking a burlesque class accompanied by a reluctant Max. Also, Max decides to take up a new hobby and goes golfing with Han.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: A young woman and her three-year-old son are shot to death while driving through gang territory in the wrong colored car, and the gun used in the murder is quickly connected to the most troubling series of unsolved homicides in LAPD history.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Meets Dale the Whale

programme.desc: A plaintiff sues for the cost of artwork. A man sues the manager of golf course for property damage.

programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.desc: Man sues over damaged espresso machine; a dispute over the sale of a used car.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Taylor vs. Thompson
programme.desc: A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of hiding his daughter from him for 18-years! Tears flow, but her mother believes her daughter is the result of an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The defendant claims to be the plaintiff's deceased son's daughter, so she has petitioned the court for a DNA test.
